# K. Notes

This is a Hacker News clone called K. Notes.
The app allows users to view, search, and submit stories.
It is built with vanilla HTML/JS and Tailwind CSS.
Authentication and Database are provided by Supabase.

## Structure
- index.html: Main story feed
- viewer.html: View a single story and its comments
- login.html: Authentication (Login/Register)
- static pages: faq, guidelines, legal, api, lists, security, contact
